options.a: the abeam distance error, to the left or right from the desired flight plan leg to the aircraft position.
options.b: the distance error between the FMS computed position and the GPS computed position.
options.c: the angular distance error, to the left or right from the desired track (DT) to the aircraft track (TK).
options.d: the distance error between the FMS computed position and the IRS computed position.
